name: X12-837 Claim Processing
summary: 837 claim-processing strategy with ephemeral stage-1 and unified cn[] output.
description: Parse X12 837 to ephemeral structure (not persisted by default), map to Claim ContextObject, flatten to cn[] (same shape as openEHR) for unified querying.

strategy.description: Single collection config with optional stage-1 persistence

ui.status_message: This strategy showcases our vision for X12 EDI claim processing with unified ContextObject output. It's part of our roadmap to bridge healthcare administrative data with clinical records. Interested in contributing? Join us in building interoperable healthcare data solutions.
benefits: Unified cn[] format enables cross-domain queries
Same cn[] shape as openEHR for unified queries
constraints: Stage-1 not persisted by default (enable via transform.debug.persistStage1)
Requires CO mapping rules per transaction type
pick_when: Want unified query model across X12 and openEHR
avoid_when: Need lossless EDI preservation for compliance

ops.name: resolve_context_contract
ops.summary: Resolve a natural-language-like draft against published or inline ContextObject definitions

ops.name: compile_con2l
ops.summary: Compile an executable Con2L contract into a deterministic Mongo query plan

ops.name: summarize_object_map
ops.summary: Summarize a Context Map against the available ContextObject definitions

ops.name: negotiate_con2l
ops.summary: Resolve a Con2L draft, emit an executable contract when ready, and compile it
